description: An execution prompt is the final instruction artifact delivered to an executor model. It is produced by the `prompt` command and saved to automation/state/execution_prompt.md.

fields.constraints: Numbered checklist of hard constraints the executor must honor
fields.inputs: Exact file paths and content the executor needs to read
fields.outputs: Exact file paths and schemas the executor must produce
fields.procedure: Step-by-step implementation instructions in dependency order
fields.validation: Checks the executor must run before calling the task complete
fields.output_format: Structure of the executor's final response (file list + summary)

note: This schema is informational. The execution_prompt.md artifact is free-form Markdown. The fields above describe the expected structure so that the synthesizer model produces consistent prompts and the review step can assess completeness.
